requirement_topic.en: ENERGY STAR — Voluntary EPA/DOE Efficiency Programme

summary.en: ENERGY STAR is a voluntary programme jointly administered by the US EPA and DOE that certifies products meeting enhanced efficiency thresholds above the DOE federal minimum. For air-source heat pumps, ENERGY STAR certification requires performance data verified to ANSI/AHRI 210/240-2023 and rated values that meet or exceed ENERGY STAR minimum thresholds (which are higher than the DOE federal minimums). As of the current ENERGY STAR Version 6.1 specification for central air conditioning and heat pumps: split-system heat pumps must achieve HSPF2 ≥ 7.5 and SEER2 ≥ 15.2 (these thresholds are updated periodically — verify at energystar.gov). The ENERGY STAR Most Efficient designation identifies the top-performing products each year. ENERGY STAR is practically required for: (1) IRA Section 25C federal tax credit eligibility (consumers receive up to USD 2,000 tax credit for ENERGY STAR certified heat pump installations); (2) utility rebate programme qualification; (3) new home builder certifications (e.g., ENERGY STAR Homes). Without ENERGY STAR, products cannot access the IRA tax credit channel, which is a significant consumer purchase incentive.
summary.zh: ENERGY STAR是由美国EPA和DOE联合管理的自愿计划，对高于DOE联邦最低标准的增强能效产品进行认证。空气源热泵获得ENERGY STAR认证，须提供经ANSI/AHRI 210/240-2023核实的性能数据，且额定值须达到或超过ENERGY STAR最低阈值（高于DOE联邦最低标准）。依据现行《中央空调及热泵ENERGY STAR V6.1规范》：分体式热泵须达到HSPF2 ≥ 7.5和SEER2 ≥ 15.2（上述阈值定期更新——请于energystar.gov核实）。ENERGY STAR最高效（Most Efficient）认定每年评选年度最佳性能产品。以下情况实际需要ENERGY STAR：（1）IRA第25C条联邦税收抵免资格（消费者安装ENERGY STAR认证热泵最高可获2,000美元税收抵免）；（2）公用事业返还计划资格；（3）新建住宅认证（如ENERGY STAR Homes）。未获ENERGY STAR认证的产品，无法进入IRA税收抵免渠道，而这是重要的消费者购买激励。
summary.zht: ENERGY STAR是由美國EPA和DOE聯合管理的自願計劃，對高於DOE聯邦最低標準的增強能效產品進行認證。空氣源熱泵獲得ENERGY STAR認證，須提供經ANSI/AHRI 210/240-2023核實的性能數據，且額定值須達到或超過ENERGY STAR最低閾值（高於DOE聯邦最低標準）。依據現行《中央空調及熱泵ENERGY STAR V6.1規範》：分體式熱泵須達到HSPF2 ≥ 7.5和SEER2 ≥ 15.2（上述閾值定期更新——請於energystar.gov核實）。ENERGY STAR最高效（Most Efficient）認定每年評選年度最佳性能產品。以下情況實際需要ENERGY STAR：（1）IRA第25C條聯邦稅收抵免資格（消費者安裝ENERGY STAR認證熱泵最高可獲2,000美元稅收抵免）；（2）公用事業返還計劃資格；（3）新建住宅認證（如ENERGY STAR Homes）。未獲ENERGY STAR認證的產品，無法進入IRA稅收抵免渠道，而這是重要的消費者購買激勵。

standards_or_laws: ENERGY STAR Programme Requirements for Central Air Conditioning and Heat Pumps (current specification, Version 6.1 or later — verify at energystar.gov)
IRA Section 25C — Energy Efficient Home Improvement Credit (links ENERGY STAR certification to consumer tax credit eligibility)
ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240-2023 — underlying test standard for ENERGY STAR performance verification

summary.en: China's equivalent voluntary energy efficiency recognition programme is the China Energy Label (CEL) tiered efficiency grades (Grade 1 being most efficient) under the mandatory CEL scheme administered by NDRC and SAMR. A separate voluntary programme is the CQC Energy Efficiency Mark. Neither the CEL grade nor the CQC Energy Efficiency Mark is recognised as equivalent to US ENERGY STAR certification. Chinese Grade 1 efficiency products may or may not meet ENERGY STAR thresholds — the metrics (APF vs. HSPF2/SEER2) are not directly comparable and the products would need independent AHRI 210/240-2023 testing to verify ENERGY STAR eligibility.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自愿能效认可计划为由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）和市场监管总局（SAMR）管理的强制性能效标识（CEL）分级制度（1级为最高效）。另有独立自愿计划为CQC能效标志。CEL等级和CQC能效标志均不被认可为等同于美国ENERGY STAR认证。中国1级能效产品不一定符合ENERGY STAR阈值——两者指标（APF与HSPF2/SEER2）不可直接比较，产品须经AHRI 210/240-2023独立测试方可核实ENERGY STAR资格。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自願能效認可計劃為由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）和市場監管總局（SAMR）管理的強制性能效標識（CEL）分級制度（1級為最高效）。另有獨立自願計劃為CQC能效標誌。CEL等級和CQC能效標誌均不被認可為等同於美國ENERGY STAR認證。中國1級能效產品不一定符合ENERGY STAR閾值——兩者指標（APF與HSPF2/SEER2）不可直接比較，產品須經AHRI 210/240-2023獨立測試方可核實ENERGY STAR資格。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) — Mandatory display programme, Grade 1-5, administered by NDRC/SAMR
CQC Energy Efficiency Mark — Voluntary (China Quality Certification Centre)

gap.en: ENERGY STAR certification requires: (1) AHRI 210/240-2023 testing and AHRI Certified listing (a prerequisite); (2) rated HSPF2 and SEER2 values that meet or exceed current ENERGY STAR thresholds (verify current thresholds at energystar.gov as they are periodically updated); (3) ENERGY STAR partnership agreement with EPA; (4) product listing on the ENERGY STAR certified products database. The gap for Chinese ASHP products is both a performance gap (products designed for Chinese climate and efficiency metrics may not achieve ENERGY STAR thresholds when re-rated to HSPF2/SEER2) and a certification process gap (AHRI 210/240 testing must precede ENERGY STAR application). Chinese CEL Grade 1 certification does not substitute.
gap.zh: ENERGY STAR认证须：（1）完成AHRI 210/240-2023测试并获AHRI认证列名（前提条件）；（2）额定HSPF2和SEER2值达到或超过现行ENERGY STAR阈值（请于energystar.gov核实当前阈值，因其定期更新）；（3）与EPA签订ENERGY STAR合作协议；（4）在ENERGY STAR认证产品数据库中列名。中国ASHP产品的差距既是性能差距（针对中国气候和能效指标设计的产品，按HSPF2/SEER2重新评级后可能达不到ENERGY STAR阈值），也是认证流程差距（AHRI 210/240测试须先于ENERGY STAR申请）。中国CEL 1级认证不可替代。
gap.zht: ENERGY STAR認證須：（1）完成AHRI 210/240-2023測試並獲AHRI認證列名（前提條件）；（2）額定HSPF2和SEER2值達到或超過現行ENERGY STAR閾值（請於energystar.gov核實當前閾值，因其定期更新）；（3）與EPA簽訂ENERGY STAR合作協議；（4）在ENERGY STAR認證產品數據庫中列名。中國ASHP產品的差距既是性能差距（針對中國氣候和能效指標設計的產品，按HSPF2/SEER2重新評級後可能達不到ENERGY STAR閾值），也是認證流程差距（AHRI 210/240測試須先於ENERGY STAR申請）。中國CEL 1級認證不可替代。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — ENERGY STAR is not required by federal law, but is practically required for IRA Section 25C consumer tax credits, utility rebates, and new home builder certifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — CEL Grade 1 and CQC Energy Efficiency Mark are both voluntary recognition programmes; CEL mandatory display is a separate requirement

source.publisher: US EPA / US DOE — ENERGY STAR Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ENERGY STAR certification is voluntary but practically required for IRA Section 25C consumer tax credit eligibility (up to USD 2,000 per installation) and most US utility rebate programmes. Chinese CEL Grade 1 certification does not substitute. Products must first obtain AHRI Certified listing (requiring AHRI 210/240-2023 testing), then apply for ENERGY STAR partnership with EPA. Rated HSPF2/SEER2 performance must meet current ENERGY STAR thresholds — Chinese APF ratings are not directly comparable.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】ENERGY STAR认证属自愿，但实为获得IRA第25C条消费者税收抵免资格（每次安装最高2,000美元）和大多数美国公用事业返还计划的实际要求。中国CEL 1级认证不可替代。产品须先获AHRI认证列名（需完成AHRI 210/240-2023测试），再向EPA申请ENERGY STAR合作关系。额定HSPF2/SEER2性能须达到现行ENERGY STAR阈值——中国APF额定值不可直接比较。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】ENERGY STAR認證屬自願，但實為獲得IRA第25C條消費者稅收抵免資格（每次安裝最高2,000美元）和大多數美國公用事業返還計劃的實際要求。中國CEL 1級認證不可替代。產品須先獲AHRI認證列名（需完成AHRI 210/240-2023測試），再向EPA申請ENERGY STAR合作關係。額定HSPF2/SEER2性能須達到現行ENERGY STAR閾值——中國APF額定值不可直接比較。
